caption: In a rural outdoor setting with reddish-brown earth and lush green foliage in the background, several people are gathered near a simple wooden structure. A woman sits in the center, wearing a colorful patterned wrap and a light-colored headscarf, gesturing with her hands as she speaks. Next to her, another woman is seated, wearing a green and red patterned dress. A man sits further back, wearing a dark blue shirt. The woman in the center remains seated throughout the sequence, her hand movements shifting slightly as she continues her expression. The white on-screen text "We have no access to information or training." remains constant across the scene. The camera remains static, capturing the group in a medium shot with minimal movement beyond the central woman's gestures and slight shifts in posture among the group.
